Who we are

Guelph’s student-built lawn care company

Yardex is a local, owner-run team of 5 maintaining 50 Guelph properties every week with commercial equipment and small-company care. We’re not a franchise and we don’t do lock-in — clients stay because the lawn looks great and the reply comes fast.

What we do

Full-service residential lawn care

Most popular · from $27.50

Lawn Mowing

Weekly cuts at 3 inches with trimming and full blowdown, every visit.

Book Now Learn more
Seasonal

Fertilizing & Overseeding

Slow-release feedings and overseeding for thick, weed-resistant turf.

Book Now Learn more
Spring & fall

Aeration & Overseeding

Core aeration to relieve compaction, paired with seed for density.

Book Now Learn more
Spring & fall

Spring & Fall Cleanup

Season-opening cleanups and full fall leaf removal — beds and lawn handled.

Book Now Learn more
Beds & gardens

Mulching

Bed cleanup and fresh mulch for defined, low-maintenance gardens.

Book Now Learn more
All season

Weed Control

Garden bed weeding and maintenance to keep growth in check.

View All Services
Recent work

Real Yardex lawns, all over Guelph

Our story

Founded in Guelph. Built by hand.

Yardex was founded in 2020 by Carter Florence — a Guelph local who started at 12 years old with a rake, a yard-waste bag, and a determination to build something of his own. Today it’s a 5-person crew serving 50 lawns every week, featured in GuelphToday and recognized with a 2024 Quality Business Award.

Read the full story
How it works

From first message to first cut

01

Contact us

Send the quick quote form, or call and text us directly at (519) 835-0774. Tell us your address and what you need — takes under a minute.

Start here
02

Get your free quote

We reply within 24 hours — usually same-day — with a firm price for your exact property. Mowing starts at $27.50 per cut, everything included.

See pricing
03

Service begins

You get a consistent weekly day and the same crew every visit — mowing, trimming, edging and blowdown, with rain days shifted and communicated.

What’s included
04

Stay because it’s good

No contracts, no cancellation fees. Skip a week or stop anytime with a text. Most clients stay all season — and 75+ five-star reviews say why.

Get a Free Quote

Swipe or use the arrows to move through the steps.

Recognition

Awards & press

Recognized for business excellence in lawn care in Guelph, based on customer reviews, ratings and reputation.

Guelph’s local news covered the Yardex founding story — a 12-year-old building a real business one lawn at a time. Read the article.

A public Better Business Bureau profile you can check anytime — because trust should be verifiable, not claimed. View the profile.

Reviews

What Guelph homeowners say

Read all 75+ reviews, awards and press  ·  Visit our Google profile

Service area

Proudly serving all of Guelph

We’re Guelph-only on purpose — a tight route means we show up on schedule, every week, in every corner of the city. Our weekly routes run through the South End, Kortright, Westminster Woods, Clairfields, Hanlon Creek, the Old University neighbourhood, Downtown, Exhibition Park, Grange Hill East, Riverside Park, Eastview, Pineridge and West Willow Woods. If you’re in Guelph, you’re in our service area.

Common questions

Quick answers

Do I have to sign a contract?

No. Yardex has no contracts and no cancellation fees. You can pause, skip a week, or stop service at any time with a quick text or email.

How much does lawn mowing cost in Guelph?

Our weekly mowing starts at $27.50 per cut for smaller city lots, and every quote is based on your actual property. See our pricing page for a full breakdown of what affects the price.

Who actually shows up to mow my lawn?

Our own team of 5 — the same local crew each week, using commercial equipment. Yardex is owner-run, so if you ever have a question, you talk directly to Carter.

What areas do you serve?

All residential Guelph, Ontario. If you’re in the city, you’re on our map.

See all frequently asked questions
